summary: GH-92 minimal spec is approved for a package-local normalized output schema PR. The spec correctly limits scope to structured output, source/evidence refs, available/empty/unavailable states, manifest output asset status, and GH-92 carrier binding.
reviewed_validation_summary: Local validation passed for `jq empty sites/example/read-public-page/manifest.json sites/example/read-public-page/schemas/output.schema.json .loom/bootstrap/init-result.json .loom/specs/GH-92/build-evidence.json`, `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-92 --json`, and `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-92 --json` at head `8708acf26151c6ec60d2dca94698b04daa8501e4`.
follow_ups: Run separate Work Items for GH-93 through GH-98 before treating the package as resource-complete, fixture-backed, or validator-consumable.
